MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-20-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kimberly Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for moving party Brayton Purcell LLP
Plaintiff Theresa Jones-Cook appearing by phone on her own behalf. No appearance for Mary Jo Jones

RULING:
BRAYTON PURCELL LLP'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFFS MARY JO JONES AND THERESA JONES-COOK

Hearing was conducted in a closed courtroom due to attorney-client privilege. The Court made the following ruling: Brayton Purcell LLP's motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiffs Mary Jo Jones and Theresa Jones-Cook is granted. Transcript of the proceeding is ordered sealed. Two orders signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Jeannie M. Chimpky of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #12742 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-17-2014 Continued To May-20-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
Brayton Purcell LLP's motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiffs Mary Jo Jones and Theresa Jones-Cook.

APPEARANCES: Oren P. Noah, Esq. of Brayton Purcell LLP 415/898-1555 moving to be relieved as counsel for pltfs Mary Jo Jones and Theresa Jones-Cook; no other appearances.

RULING: Hearing held. The Court continued the matter to 05/20/14 at 9:30am for counsel to provide the addresses of their clients. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Holly Sayers of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #13678 (510/451-1580) (503/TLJ)
